description_long: This is a freestanding A-frame advertising board with a dark rectangular display surface bordered by a medium-brown wooden frame. The front face features a pixel-art style red graphic of a coffee cup above the text '$2 Cafe' and a small smiley face, all rendered in a blocky, digital font. The board stands on two sturdy wooden legs that form an inverted 'V' when viewed from the side, providing stability and allowing it to be easily placed on sidewalks or near entrances. The rear side is plain, with no visible graphics or text, and the construction suggests it is lightweight enough to be moved by hand. The surface appears matte and non-reflective, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments. There are no visible illumination features or interactive components beyond the display area.
description: A freestanding A-frame wooden advertising board with a dark display surface and red pixel-art cafe advertisement, supported by two angled legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark display surface with red pixel-art coffee cup, '$2 Cafe' text, and a smiley face.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the A-frame structure with two brown wooden legs forming an inverted 'V', no visible display content.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, displaying the advertisement and graphics clearly.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, showing the angled wooden legs and the board's thickness.
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness wooden frame with straight edges
attribute_advertisement_content: static chalkboard-style display with red pixel-art coffee cup and '$2 Cafe' text
